race.comment: The top hopes went around in the Listed Oxlade over 1200m here a fortnight ago. The winner was COOL GENT (2) who saw them all on straightening before letting down with an electrifying finish. Progressive two-year-old who should have the measure of those rivals again over an extra 200m today. MARFFIANO (1) also finished off nicely in the Oxlade, grabbing second but no match for the winner. Might race a bit closer with blinkers on for the first time today. Looks the best chance to turn the tables. HARD TO EXCEED (5) went very wide on the turn and didn't quite finish off as hoped behind COOL GENT two weeks back. That was his first run in 101 days so expect a bit more this time. SAY YOU WILL (11) picked up impressively in the closing stages to finish fourth in the Oxlade. Decent chance over the longer trip. PEARL OF DUBAI (9) has been up for a while but continues to race well and looks in need of 1400m.
